skills.title: Button System
skills.description: Build a complete multi-variant button component system with primary, secondary, danger, and ghost styles across small, medium, and large sizes.
skills.author: ufira-ai

skills.title: Card Component
skills.description: Build a card component with an image placeholder, title, body text, and a CTA button instance using auto-layout and exposed text properties.
skills.author: ufira-ai

skills.title: Color System
skills.description: Build a semantic color system with primitive paint styles and semantic design tokens as Figma variables supporting light and dark modes.
skills.author: ufira-ai

skills.title: Design Audit
skills.description: Run a systematic design audit using lint_node across an entire selection or page, group issues by rule, and produce a prioritized report.
skills.author: ufira-ai

skills.title: Icon Grid
skills.description: Build a WRAP auto-layout icon grid with 24×24 icon frames, a base icon component, and instanced icons arranged in a responsive wrap layout.
skills.author: ufira-ai
